programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Aoi and Hazuka are classmates, but they are not friends. The two girls meet an elderly woman who wants to give a love letter to her first love. Hazuka and Aoi try to find her first love.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Dancing Cat

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.desc: Astronauts (Liev Schreiber, Elias Koteas, Romola Garai) on Mars contend with a microbe that turns those it infects into zombielike killers.

programme.title: Splinter
programme.desc: A vacationing couple and an escaped convict become trapped by a voracious parasite that devours its victims from the inside out.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer hunts a widow in the wilderness after she escapes from his remote cabin in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: The Canyon
programme.desc: A honeymooning couple has to survive in the Grand Canyon after getting lost.

programme.title: Good Neighbors

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Held
programme.desc: A couple's ailing marriage gets put to the test when they are held hostage in an isolated vacation rental by an unseen voice that commands their every move and threatens harm if they don't obey.

programme.title: You Are Not My Mother
programme.desc: In a North Dublin housing estate, Char's mother goes missing. When she returns, Char is determined to uncover the truth of her disappearance and unearth the dark secrets of her family.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: Bad Milo!
programme.desc: A stressed-out man (Ken Marino) discovers that a tiny demon lives in his intestine, and that excessive anxiety causes the creature to escape and slaughter the man's tormentors.

programme.title: John Dies at the End
programme.desc: A new drug promises out-of-body experiences, but users are coming back changed forever, and an otherworldly invasion of Earth is underway.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale vs Evil
programme.desc: Two scruffy pals' (Tyler Labine, Alan Tudyk) backwoods vacation takes a bloody turn when ignorant college students mistake them for a pair of murderous hillbillies.

programme.title: First Date
programme.desc: Conned into buying a shady '65 Chrysler, shy teen Mike's eagerly anticipated first date with the girl next door, Kelsey, implodes as he finds himself targeted by criminals, cops and a crazy cat lady.

programme.title: Rabbit Trap
programme.desc: While collecting audio samples, a musician creates a field recording of a mysterious sound never before heard by human ears. As the echoes of music bleed into the surrounding countryside, ancient and malevolent woodland forces are disturbed.

programme.title: The Windigo
programme.desc: A Native American teenager and his grandmother resurrect an ancient demon to protect their family from backwoods meth dealers. However, they soon discover that the creature's lust for killing can't be controlled.

programme.title: Malice in Wonderland
programme.desc: In London a cab hits a law student, who then goes to a land filled with riffraff.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: The Burning Sea
programme.desc: A submarine operator descends to the ocean floor to save the man she loves from a sunken oil rig.

programme.title: Alan Partridge

programme.title: 2 Days in New York
programme.desc: A happily married man's (Chris Rock) sanity is pushed to the limit when his wife's (Julie Delpy) crazed, over-sexed French relatives crash their cramped New York apartment.

programme.title: What Just Happened?
programme.desc: A movie producer tries to engineer a reconciliation with his ex-wife while dealing with a number of problems surrounding his latest projects.

programme.title: Barry Munday
programme.desc: A slacker (Patrick Wilson) inherits new responsibilities after he impregnates a stranger (Judy Greer).

programme.title: Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Four young women have a series of wild and raucous adventures during a bachelorette party in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tangerine

programme.title: I Give It a Year
programme.desc: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Route 666
programme.desc: Two federal agents (Lou Diamond Phillips, Lori Petty) encounter zombies on a desert highway years after the massacre of a chain gang.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A fallen swordsman (Clive Owen) leads a small army against a sadistic ruler to avenge his dishonored master (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.desc: Una hora, 10 desafíos, un gran premio, y el afamado conductor Marco Antonio Regil mantendrán a la audiencia pegada a sus sillas mientras los concursantes utilizan artículos de uso diario encontrados en la mayoría de los hogares.

programme.desc: Un talk show cómico, diferente y entretenido con Platanito, quien entrevistará a importantes personajes de la farándula, concursos y rutinas de comedia.

programme.title: Espérame en Siberia, vida mía

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli, aerospace expert and former NASA employee, visits research institutes and NASA's astronaut facilities to unlock the mysteries of space.

programme.title: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman (Sharon Leal) puts her family, career and life on the line to satisfy her addiction to sex.

programme.title: Rappin'
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mario Van Peebles) shows residents of his Pittsburgh ghetto how to drive out riffraff with rap music.

programme.title: I'm Charlie Walker
programme.desc: Trucking and construction entrepreneur Charlie Walker fights institutional racism while cleaning up a massive oil spill off the coast of San Francisco in 1971.

programme.title: Mr. Church
programme.desc: When a young girl and her dying mother are joined by a black male cook who comes to live with them, little do they know that their lives are about to change forever.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Power figures want a Caribbean police chief (Denzel Washington) to find his friend Maubee (Robert Townsend), their scapegoat for a murder.

programme.title: Original Gangstas
programme.desc: Former gang members return to depressed Gary, Ind., to quell violence perpetrated by their successors.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Chain of Command
programme.desc: James Webster returns from duty to find his brother murdered. Now, as he pursues the perpetrators and follows the chain, he discovers a conspiracy that runs deep within the government.

programme.title: Armed Response
programme.desc: Trained operatives find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound after its artificial intelligence is suddenly shut down. There, they begin to experience strange and horrific phenomena.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: When three rappers want to get even with a pimp, they accidentally unleash a leprechaun who goes on a killing rampage in tha 'hood.

programme.title: Leprechaun: Back 2 tha Hood
programme.desc: When Emily Woodrow and her friends happen on a treasure chest full of gold coins, they encounter trouble with a very nasty and protective Leprechaun.

programme.title: Snipes
programme.desc: A teenager (Sam Jones III) must elude thugs who believe he is responsible for the disappearance of a rapper (Nelly) and an unfinished album.

programme.title: Uncle P
programme.desc: A hip-hop superstar (Percy Miller) has his hands full while watching his sister's three children in the suburbs.

programme.title: 10 Items or Less
programme.desc: Researching a role at a grocery store, an actor (Morgan Freeman) bonds with a feisty cashier (Paz Vega) who is preparing to interview for a new job.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Two cool Chicago undercover officers (Gregory Hines, Billy Crystal) try to put a drug lord (Jimmy Smits) permanently out of business.

programme.title: Soldier Boyz
programme.desc: An ex-Marine prison counselor leads juvenile offenders on a mission to rescue a tycoon's daughter held hostage in Vietnam.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Chain of Command
programme.desc: James Webster returns from duty to find his brother murdered. Now, as he pursues the perpetrators and follows the chain, he discovers a conspiracy that runs deep within the government.

programme.title: One in the Chamber
programme.desc: An experienced assassin works for both sides of a Russian gang war and becomes the target of a hidden enemy.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: A New Orleans paramedic encounters a psychedelic drug that challenges everything he knows about reality -- and the flow of time itself.

programme.title: Sorry to Bother You
programme.desc: In an alternate reality of Oakland, Calif., a telemarketer finds himself in a macabre universe after he discovers a magical key to success. He soon falls under the spell of a cocaine-snorting CEO who offers him a salary beyond his wildest dreams.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: A policeman (Mario Van Peebles) learns that the CIA saved a deranged killer from execution to use as a government assassin.

programme.title: Slow Burn
programme.desc: A district attorney (Ray Liotta) must sort out conflicting stories when his assistant DA and sometime lover (Jolene Blalock) claims that the dead man in her bed tried to rape her, but a witness (LL Cool J) tells a different tale.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Dominic Cooper) commits a fatal hit-and-run, then manipulates the case so that the man who was arrested for the crime is acquitted. After the trial, he discovers that his actions have freed a guilty man.

programme.title: Body Count
programme.desc: An art thief (Ice-T) who killed a family learns the son (Justin Theroux) and his girlfriend (Alyssa Milano) are still in the house.

programme.title: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman (Sharon Leal) puts her family, career and life on the line to satisfy her addiction to sex.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Cops and Robbers
programme.desc: A hostage negotiator plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a cornered bank robber who is hell-bent on getting out of the bank and humiliating the negotiator in the process.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Se sospecha que la autora de la maldad ha sido Olimpia, pero también se sospecha que no ha actuado sola, que lo ha hecho junto con Orestes.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella

programme.title: Mi gorda bella

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio comunica a Juana que ya ve la cabeza de la bebé. Emocionado, toma a la niña entre sus brazos.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Amparo comenta a Humberto la desaparición de Rafaelito. Mauricio trata de calmar a Juana. Recuerda a la joven que Luz Marina y Alejandro están cuidando a Mariana. No obstante, Juana está convencida de que Carlota sabe que esa niña es su hija.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre, pero ella le comunica que la llama solo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Luciano le explica a Camila por qué su mamá la abandonó y le pide que la comprenda. Octavia se burla de Ezequiel porque pierde la competencia con Max respecto a Camila, pero él planea algo para que la boda no se lleve a cabo. Camila lee el cuaderno.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Amelia está embarazada y el hijo que espera es de Sebastián, le platica a su mamá y se convierte en su secreto temporal. Los preparativos para la boda de Max y Camila están listos en el orfanato. Camila está dispuesta a vengarse de la mamá de Max.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Después de que Camila lee el cuaderno, decide no casarse con Max porque prefiere vengarse de lo que le hicieron a su mamá. Max le pide explicaciones, pero ella se niega. Max llega borracho a su casa y su mamá le dice que ya sabía qué iba a pasar.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Max le pide a su mamá explicaciones sobre el abandono de Camila y ella le dice que es enemiga de Rosa Blanco. Max sospecha que Camila lo dejó por Ezequiel. Busca a la madre superiora para que le diga la verdad y aclarar sus dudas.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken tray bake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Buddy's Strawberry Rice Pudding and Summer Tomato Chicken Bake
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a chicken sheet pan dinner with early tomatoes, potatoes and chorizo. Buddy helps pick strawberries for quick jam rice pudding. The summer feast ends with spicy shrimp skewers with homegrown chillies and a refreshing cucumber gazpacho.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Endless Summer: From Grilled Panzanella Salad to Sour Cherry Tart
programme.desc: Jamie ends summer with crispy duck in a rich plum sauce & roast potatoes. Grilled peppers star in panzanella. Garden zucchini become Mediterranean rice. Sweet finale: sour cherry frangipane with crème fraîche.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a low-cost dosa, crispy chicken, oozy barley risotto, beef stew and shortbread biscuits.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes frugal leftovers fun with spaghetti frittata, bakes air-fryer pork pies using affordable mince, and preps a batch of butternut squash dal. Plus, budget-friendly chicken shish kebabs and thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Soak up summer with the ultimate outdoor cookout, featuring smashburgers, pasta salad and scrumptious sweets. These classic dishes can be prepared indoors or out, making them the perfect recipes for backyard dinner parties on warm summer nights.

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde is back to level up his steak game by grilling up a NY strip steak with roasted onions & poblanos, short ribs with chili paste and horseradish, and a grilled châteaubriand with charred Broccolini. Steak your claim on these dishes!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde kicks lobster & steak to the curb as he puts a Spanish-style spin on your typical surf 'n' turf by creating Pork & Clams, Lobster and Mushroom Fideos, and Tomato & Tuna Bread, then washing it all down with a tasty Michelada.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde kicks the summer off right with a burger blowout featuring Brisket Burgers with Grilled Onions and Blue Cheese, Shrimp Burgers with XO Sauce and a Fried Egg, and Lamb Sliders with Feta Ranch and don't forget the Lemon Oregano Fries.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings your basic burgers to a new level with his dry-aged beef burger with potatoes and truffle Dijon mayo, a part-beef part-pork belly burger with cheddar & an egg, and lastly a crispy mushroom tortilla burger with salsa & cheese.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde shows us how he does Sunday up right as he grills up some Vietnamese Brisket with Rice Noodles, Crispy Swordfish Summer Rolls, and tops it all off with some tasty Soju Floats. Hey, it's Sunday somewhere, right?

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde channels his inner sandwich lover by making an angry lobster club with pepper aioli and grilled bacon, a lamb birria torta with avocado and ramen consommé, and an Italian beef combo with chili crisp cheese sauce, giardiniera.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: The Art of Open Fire Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Dale goes back to the roots of cooking, building a grill over an open fire to serve up a variety of dishes, including whole smoked chicken and fish, roasted cauliflower, a sweet and tangy grilled pineapple s'more dessert.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale's turning up the heat! Carolina Reaper wings hotter than your ex, sweet-chili NY strip steak, smoky grilled chipotle Texas toast, and ancho-gochujang pineapple skillet cake for dessert. Bring some water!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Ribs are a lifestyle, and Chef Dale's living it up with smoky beef shorties in tangy red wine glaze, Miami-style pork ribs dripping in bacon-guava BBQ, spicy baked beans, and killer key lime caramel cones. Grab some napkins!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings us to the bayou as he creates a NOLA-inspired menu complete with Chargrilled Oysters, Black Pepper Shrimp Po'boys, finishes it off with Bananas Foster, and washes it all down with a Fruity Grilled Hurricane.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb kofta and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat fishes the coastal inlets of Charleston, South Carolina, in search of a delicious sheepshead, which he plans to grill with his friend and chef James London.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Hickory Smoked Virginia Ham & Mint Juleps
programme.desc: Pat Martin gets a history lesson on the origin of American barbecue from "The Professor" Tuffy Stone.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his pal Jason Stanhope meet up outside of Charleston for a day of quail hunting and grilling birds over live coals.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin links up with his pal, Bill Darsinos, to enjoy a tradition from the heart of Bill's Greek culture when they cook a whole lamb on a spit roast.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly-fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Susie from Hey Grill Hey teaches you how to make a full family dinner right in your own backyard in under 30 minutes! When you serve this grilled honey mustard chicken, creamed corn, and mixed veggies, you'll feel like a Weeknight BBQ Hero!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Susie's bringing in a special guest so you can bring the steakhouse to your backyard! Christie Vanover of Girls Can Grill joins the fun and brings some fingerling potatoes to round out the ribeyes, asparagus, and a one-of-a-kind compound butter!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: It's always kind of a party in the backyard, but it's really a party when Susie breaks out the smoker for some legendary pulled pork sliders, a homemade coleslaw, and a mac and cheese so creamy even the grownups will rave about it.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Grill fatigue is a very real problem, but the globally-inspired menu of carne asada, tomatillo salsa, Mexican street corn, and Tex-Mex beans in this episode of Backyard BBQ Hero is sure to reignite the fire inside and get you outside cooking!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: If you love outdoor grilling AND flexing your skills by entertaining guests, the next Backyard BBQ Hero is required viewing. Fire up the grill for a show-stopping Santa Maria-style tri tip, a zesty salad, and an unbelievable dinner bread!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Pitmaster Jason Neeley (Pica Rica BBQ) drops by the backyard to share some insider tips for nailing the perfect brisket and helps Susie make pickled vegetables to go alongside her dad's hot potato salad! This is a must-watch for serious Pitmasters.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas Desert.

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gualberto "Weber" Elizondo surprised his family when his grilling hobby turned him into a local celebrity and internet sensation. Meanwhile, chef Chuy Villareal of Cara De Vaca wants the world to know that the north of Mexico isn't just carne asada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack on the Rio Ramos into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew. Down the road, another restaurant uses traditional stews in their famous empalmes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Nuevo León is divided between two pro soccer teams: Los Tigres and Los Rayados. Pati tries the food at each stadium with the teams' stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote the book on Mexican bread. Pati visits his workshop for his secret to making the perfect campechana, then meets Chuy Elizondo, owner of one of the hottest brunch spots in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo - and it's hard work! Then, in the magic town of Bustamante, three sisters make traditional bread in adobe ovens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns Huerto Urbano, an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients. And her husband is one of the region's greatest culinary pioneers.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In Australia, in the popular city of Melbourne are two hotels that attract visitors from around the world. In the heart of the city is the oldest heritage hotel in Australia. And an hour's drive South of the city is the vineyard hotel The Jackalope.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two completely different parts of the African continent, both offering guests a unique and contrasting flavour of Africa.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Cubanos, Empanadas, & Smoked Beef Rib in Miami
programme.desc: Frankie goes to Miami to sample serious cherry smoked beef rib, three cheese spinach empanadas, and a legendary Cubano sandwich with homemade mustard.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Chiles, Burgers, & Tenderloins in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Frankie heads to Santa Fe investigating New Mexican cuisines eating green chile burgers, poblano chile stews, and sweet blue-corn pancakes.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favorite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chili Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a father and son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the "Land of Eternal Spring"!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Exploring The 'Wet Market' Of Nha Trang
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang—a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Chili Sauce in Hoi An
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hội An. He visits a family who has been making chili sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bombshells.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Seafood With A Bang, Here In Da Nang
programme.desc: On this stop of his Vietnam journey, Luke visits the bustling seaside city of Da Nang. Join him as he visits the spectacular Dragon Bridge, looks up some succulent shrimp on the beach, and stumbles upon a tiny fishing village packed with restaurants.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke visits Huế - famous for its heritage and cuisine - and Con Hen Village to learn a technique for de-shelling baby clams, searches for best bowl of spicy beef noodle soup, and stops by a business where they make turmeric vermicelli noodle salad!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Tasty Ant Eggs in Ninh Binh
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Searching For The Banh Da Noodle in Hai Phong
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delicious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delicious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vietnamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.
